label: 拓扑开门
description: 在输入拓扑（墙状 0/1 grid）上挑出 count 个宽度为 width 的门洞段。先在每段连续墙体（≥6 格）的中心找候选，要求候选至少有一侧紧邻空格；若候选不足则 fallback 到无段长限制的逐格枚举。输出只包含被挑中的门洞格。
description-en: Picks `count` doorway segments of `width` cells from an input topology (wall-like 0/1 grid). First seeks segment-center candidates within continuous wall runs (>=6 cells), requiring an empty neighbor on the perpendicular side; falls back to per-cell enumeration if needed. Output contains only the chosen door cells.
icon: 深色背景上一条水平细线中间出现一段亮色短缺口表示门洞，扁平插画风格，简洁小图标，主色2种。

inputs.name: topology
inputs.label: 输入拓扑
inputs.description: 要在其上开门的 0/1 拓扑 grid（通常是墙体）。
inputs.description-en: 0/1 topology grid (typically a wall) where doors will be picked.

inputs.name: count
inputs.label: 门数量
inputs.description: 目标开门数量；若候选不足，实际数量可能小于此值。
inputs.description-en: Target number of doors; the actual count may be smaller if candidates are insufficient.

inputs.name: seed
inputs.label: 随机种子
inputs.description: 随机种子，0 使用当前时间。

inputs.name: bottomDoor
inputs.label: 外门朝下
inputs.description: 默认关。开启后只在朝下且朝向建筑外部的水平墙段开门，并优先取最靠下的墙——适配 2D 俯视角游戏外门通常开在下方。建议同时接入 region 输入以可靠区分室内/室外（墙有缺口时尤其重要）；未接 region 时退回边界泛洪启发式。关闭时上下左右皆可。
inputs.description-en: Default off. When on, doors are only placed on downward-facing horizontal walls that face the building exterior, preferring the lowest wall — matching top-down 2D games where the exterior door opens at the bottom. Wire the `region` input for reliable inside/outside detection (important when walls have gaps); without it, a border flood-fill heuristic is used. When off, any side is allowed.

inputs.name: region
inputs.label: 建筑区域
inputs.description: 可选。建筑整体区域（含墙）的 0/1 grid：1=属于这栋建筑，0=建筑之外，须与 topology 同形状。提供后用它判定内外（朝下朝外=正下方区域为 0），对墙体缺口完全鲁棒；仅在 bottomDoor 开启时生效。
inputs.description-en: Optional. 0/1 grid of the whole building footprint including walls: 1 = belongs to this building, 0 = outside; must match the topology shape. When provided it is used to decide inside/outside (downward-exterior = the region cell directly below is 0), robust to gaps in walls; only takes effect when bottomDoor is on.

outputs.name: topology
outputs.label: 门拓扑
outputs.description: 挑出的门洞位置 0/1 grid，与输入拓扑同形状。
outputs.description-en: 0/1 topology of chosen door cells, same shape as input.

outputs.name: placed
outputs.label: 实际数量
outputs.description: 成功放置的门数（可能小于 count）。
outputs.description-en: Number of doors actually placed (may be less than count).
